ground_truth.title: The Top SEO Experts of 2025 – First Page Sage
ground_truth.author: First Page Sage Staff
ground_truth.main_content:
In our latest study, we crunched the data to determine the top SEO experts available for consulting, speaking, or interviews in 2025. By comparing SEO experts on the basis of their experience, publications, speaking experience, citations on Google, and social media influence, we came up with the 8 experts that appear to understand modern SEO better than the rest. In the table below, we list these 11 SEO experts along with the criteria we used to compare them. Afterwards, we describe each expert in greater detail, sharing their area of expertise within the field of SEO, the recognition they've received for their talent, and their availability for collaboration.

The article profiles the following experts:

Evan Bailyn: One of the early pioneers of modern SEO, taking up study of Google's search algorithm before the company went public in 2004. He currently runs the largest SEO agency in the U.S., and has been profiled in the Wall Street Journal, the New York Times, and Forbes. His expertise is in the confluence of thought leadership content and SEO strategy.

Brian Dean: Founded the popular online marketing blog Backlinko, which specializes in backlink building strategies. He has been featured in Forbes, Entrepreneur.com, and TechCrunch, and currently offers SEO training for professional marketers. In 2023 he founded Exploding Topics.

Barry Schwartz: Runs the popular SEO news website Search Engine Land. He is also the CEO of Rusty Brick, a web design and development firm and has received awards from US Search Awards and Search Engine Land.

AJ Ghergich: Holder of the coveted @SEO Twitter handle. A serial entrepreneur-marketer, he ran his own agency for 6 years and is currently VP Consulting Services at Botify.

Aleyda Solis: Specializes in international SEO, particularly in European, American, and Latin-American markets. She was the European Search Award's Personality of the Year in 2018.

Cyrus Shepard: Led the SEO and content team at Moz before founding his own SEO consulting agency in Zyppy. He specializes in on-page SEO, technical SEO, site architecture, and internal linking.

Marie Haynes: A specialist whose expertise lies in website quality, backlink audits, and manual action removals. She has published two books on link auditing and Google's Quality Raters' Guidelines.

Vanessa Fox: Worked on Google Webmaster Central, an early educational resource Google created for website owners and administrators. She is the founder of Keylime Toolbox, an SEO metrics platform.

Pete Meyers: The Principal Innovation Architect at Moz, creator of the MozCast tool for tracking 'turbulence' in Google's algorithm.

Danny Sullivan: A former journalist and cofounder of Search Engine Land who joined Google as a public liaison in 2017.

Jono Alderson: The head of SEO at Yoast until 2023, the leading SEO plugin for WordPress, before leaving to offer his services as an independent consultant.
